# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a research preprint with clear empirical substance.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal empirical study of 328 configuration files, reports concrete counts and percentages, includes a defined method and dataset, and presents measured findings rather than opinion or generic commentary.

## Limits
